/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/VkContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/Swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/CommandPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/RenderPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/Descriptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vulkan/Pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/renderer/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/scene/SceneLoader.cpp.o -o VulkanEngine  /usr/lib/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libglm.a
